home.heroSub: New media polling designed to help you understand what's going on in the world.
home.stat4Tip: Active audience across Europe and beyond
home.whatHeadline: Stories told true. Communities built to last.
home.whatBody: Nowadays, more than 75% of the world are online. And more than 70% of the world are on social media. We create and curate content designed to reach those people and generate insight that's useful to brands and creators.
home.feat1Body: We tell true stories. Grounded in data. Delivered with craft. No shortcuts. No padding. No noise dressed up as signal.
home.feat2Body: The right message. The right audience. The right moment. When all three align, the result is inevitable.
home.feat3Body: Campaigns end. Communities endure. We build the latter: relationships between brands and their audiences that survive well past any single headline.

testimonials.quote: Most consultants arrive with a framework already formed. These people arrived with curiosity. By the time they delivered anything, they had asked enough good questions that we understood our own readers better than we had in years. The work followed naturally from that.
testimonials.name: Miroslav Petkov

testimonials.quote: 250 million impressions sounds abstract until you ask who was behind them. These were people who had never encountered us before and were still reading three paragraphs in. That is a different kind of scale entirely.
testimonials.name: Clara Henriksen

testimonials.quote: They took the brief seriously without taking it literally. That distinction matters more than most agencies acknowledge. The work landed because it was honest about what we were actually trying to say.
testimonials.name: Adaeze Okonkwo

testimonials.quote: I have worked with people who are technically excellent and people with good instincts. Finding both together is genuinely unusual. They also have strong opinions, which helps more than it might sound. Partners without conviction produce cautious work.
testimonials.name: Luca Ferrante
testimonials.role: Brand Strategy Lead, Meridian Group Italy

testimonials.quote: We had spent years broadcasting to everyone and landing with almost nobody. They helped us find the people for whom our work was genuinely relevant. Finding the right thirty thousand turned out to be worth considerably more than the wrong three million.
testimonials.name: Sophie Verdier

home.ctaBody: Good work takes time. We have both. Let's talk.

purpose.missionBody1: We believe the digital world deserves better. Better content, better campaigns, better relationships between brands and their audiences. Influencing Digital exists to build exactly that: a network of digital properties that earn trust through substance, not shortcuts.
purpose.missionBody2: Founded on the belief that genuine influence is more powerful than paid reach, our network operates across languages, cultures, and communities, always with authenticity at the centre.
purpose.val1Body: Every piece of content we create is grounded in truth. We build foundations that outlast any trend.
purpose.val2Body: Numbers tell us what's working. Story tells us why it matters. We use both to build influence that resonates.
purpose.val3Body: Viral moments fade. Communities last. We build for the long game, not the next news cycle.
purpose.val4Body: Our audiences are people, not metrics. We treat them accordingly: with honesty, care, and respect.
manifesto: Authenticity scales when strategy is right.
Every audience deserves content that respects them.
Digital presence only matters if it drives real-world impact.
The best brand-building feels like friendship.

brands.heroSub: Each brand in our network is built to serve a specific audience with specific needs. Together, they form a powerful, interconnected influence ecosystem.
brands.brand1Desc: A bold, data-driven political campaign bringing pragmatic common sense to Bulgarian public discourse.
brands.brand2Desc: An independent platform monitoring Bulgarian media, politics, and society with rigorous, evidence-based analysis.
brands.brand3Desc: A forward-thinking digital platform championing progressive values and evidence-based policy for a better Bulgaria.
brands.brand4Desc: Celebrating Bulgarian cultural heritage while connecting it to contemporary life and modern values.
brands.joinHeadline: Building something that deserves an audience?
brands.joinBody: We're always looking to add new brands to our network. If you have a vision for a digital property that can make a real impact, we want to hear from you.
brands.brand5Desc: Real stories from real Bulgarians, capturing the voices, choices, and everyday lives of ordinary people across the country and the diaspora.

partners.heroSub: We work with organisations that share our values: authenticity, impact, and respect for the audience.
partners.sectionHeadline: Partners who believe in genuine digital influence.
partners.sectionBody: Our partnerships are built on shared values and mutual benefit rather than commercial arrangements alone. We work with media organisations, technology companies, NGOs, and brands who understand that sustainable influence is built on trust.
partners.becomeBody: We're always open to partnerships that create real value: for our network, our partners, and our shared audiences. If your organisation is doing meaningful work in the digital space, we'd like to explore how we can support each other.

services.heroSub: From strategy to execution, we help brands build meaningful digital presence that drives real-world results.
services.serv1Desc: We develop content strategies that align with your brand values, audience needs, and business objectives. Clear, actionable plans built on data and insight, with no guesswork.
services.serv2Desc: Multi-channel campaigns that cut through the noise. We conceive, produce, and optimise campaigns that drive real results: awareness, leads, and community growth.
services.serv3Desc: From naming and identity to voice and positioning, we help brands stand out and stay consistent across every touchpoint. Built to last, not just to launch.
services.serv4Desc: Sustainable organic growth through technical SEO, content optimisation, and data-driven strategy. We build visibility that compounds over time.
services.serv5Desc: We connect brands with the right voices in the right communities. Authentic partnerships, not transactional endorsements. Relationships that build lasting credibility.
services.serv6Desc: Turn data into decisions. We track what matters, report with clarity, and help you understand the story behind the numbers so you can act with confidence.
services.step1Desc: We start by listening: to you, your audience, and your market. Deep understanding comes before any strategy.
services.step2Desc: We build a clear, actionable plan: audience definition, messaging architecture, channel selection, and success metrics.
services.step3Desc: Our team brings the strategy to life with content, campaigns, and digital experiences that genuinely resonate.
services.step4Desc: We measure, learn, and continuously improve. Good work gets better. Great work gets remarkable.

affiliation.heroSub: Join the Influencing Digital affiliation programme and access our network, expertise, and audience to accelerate your digital growth.
affiliation.howHeadline: Four steps to becoming a network affiliate.
affiliation.step1Desc: Tell us about your brand, your audience, and your goals. We review every application personally, with no automated filters.
affiliation.step2Desc: Once accepted, we set you up with access to our network resources, editorial tools, and direct team support.
affiliation.step3Desc: Start benefiting from cross-promotion, shared audiences, collaborative campaigns, and co-created content across the network.
affiliation.step4Desc: Receive competitive commission on any business you bring to the network. We believe in growing together.
affiliation.ben1Desc: Full access to our network of brands, audiences, media relationships, and industry connections.
affiliation.ben2Desc: Earn competitive commission on referrals and collaborative revenue. Transparent, fair, and paid on time.
affiliation.ben3Desc: Direct access to our strategy, content, and technical teams. No support ticket system.
affiliation.ben4Desc: Your content promoted across our entire network of digital properties and social channels.
affiliation.ben5Desc: Shared insights and analytics dashboards to help you make better, faster decisions.
affiliation.ben6Desc: Join a growing community of digital builders, creators, and brand strategists across Europe.
affiliation.applyHeadline: We're looking for the right fit.
affiliation.applyBody: Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. We are selective. If you're building something real and meaningful, we want to talk.

contact.heroSub: We're easy to reach. Work with us, join our network, or just say hello.
contact.formSuccess: Message sent. We'll be in touch soon.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Influencing Digital ('we', 'us', or 'our') is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information when you visit our website at influencing.digital.
privacy.s1Body: We may collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and message content when you contact us via our contact form. We also collect standard technical data through our website analytics, including IP addresses, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on the site.
privacy.s2Body: We use the information collected to respond to enquiries, improve our website and services, send relevant communications where you have consented, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.s3Body: Under GDPR, we process your data on the following lawful bases: your consent (where obtained), our legitimate interest in operating and improving our services, and compliance with legal obligations.
privacy.s4Body: Our website uses essential cookies necessary for its operation. We may also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with the site. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy.s5Body: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by law. Contact form submissions are typically retained for 12 months.
privacy.s6Body: Under GDPR, you have the right to: access the personal data we hold about you, request correction or deletion of your data, object to processing or request restriction, and lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at privacy@influencing.digital.
privacy.s7Body: Your data may be processed outside the European Economic Area (EEA) by our service providers. Where this occurs, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place in accordance with GDPR requirements.
privacy.s8Body: Our contact form is processed by Formspree. Our website analytics may be provided by third-party tools. These services have their own privacy policies, which we encourage you to review.
privacy.s9Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by updating the 'last updated' date above. Continued use of our website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s10Body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at privacy@influencing.digital.
